transcription.text: Wow, good to know we have that on our Prius. And lane departure alert. See what I mean? With so many safety features like pedestrian detection and lane departure alert, Toyota doesn't need us test dummies as much. Oh I get it man. Hey, I gotta get my thrill somehow. The 2017 Prius with Toyota Safety Sense Standard. Toyota, let's go places.
